rationale.rules-based-checks: Deterministic scanners inspect artifacts, configurations, secrets, and dependencies before publishing.
rationale.risk-routing: Severity thresholds and configurable policies determine pass-or-fail routing.
rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Documents security vulnerabilities arising from AI-generated code and configurations.
rationale.oversight-scaling-inversion: Vibe-coded production artifacts ship despite little human inspection.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Findings include locations, severity, CWE identifiers, and self-contained remediation guidance.
rationale.framework: Defines a modular security-gate architecture integratable into publishing pipelines.
rationale.built-system: Authors implemented and experimentally evaluated the VibeGuard tool.
rationale.problem-statement-anchor: Claude Code exposed 512,000 proprietary lines through one packaging failure.
